mapper.select: SELECT f.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.dynasty AS poem_dynasty, p.author AS poem_author, p.content AS poem_content, p.tags AS poem_tags FROM favorites f LEFT JOIN poems p ON p.id = f.poem_id WHERE f.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT f.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.dynasty AS poem_dynasty, p.author AS poem_author, p.content AS poem_content, p.tags AS poem_tags FROM favorites f LEFT JOIN poems p ON p.id = f.poem_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.favorite_type = #{favoriteType} AND f.target_key = #{targetKey} LIMIT 1
